hero.subtitle: The official job platform from Litsea Centro de Capacitación. Verified therapists for luxury hotels and spas in Cancún, Playa del Carmen and Tulum.

redEmpleadores.label: Employer network
redEmpleadores.subtitle: The best wellness establishments in the Riviera Maya trust Litsea to find certified talent.

howItWorks.label: The process
howItWorks.step1Desc: Therapists register their professional profile, certified techniques and areas where they can work.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Hotels post job opportunities and therapists can apply directly from the platform.
howItWorks.step3Desc: The Litsea team reviews applications and enables the chat between therapist and employer.
howItWorks.step4Desc: The hotel interviews the therapist and the hiring is finalized.

paraEmpleadores.label: For employers
paraEmpleadores.subtitle: Access an exclusive network of wellness professionals, ready to elevate the experience at your spa or hotel.
paraEmpleadores.benefit1Desc: All therapists are verified graduates of Litsea Centro de Capacitación. Zero risk of fake profiles.
paraEmpleadores.benefit2Desc: We review and validate every profile to ensure quality and professionalism before showing it to employers.
paraEmpleadores.benefit3Desc: Post vacancies and connect with qualified candidates in record time, without unnecessary intermediaries.

ctaFinal.cardEmpleadorDesc: Post vacancies and access certified therapists verified by Litsea, ready to work at your spa.

comoFuncionaPage.title: How it works
comoFuncionaPage.subtitle: The full process explained step by step, for therapists and employers.
comoFuncionaPage.intro: Litsea Empleos is the official job platform of Litsea Centro de Capacitación. We connect certified therapists with luxury hotels and spas in the Riviera Maya. The process is simple, transparent, and completely free for therapists.
comoFuncionaPage.forTerapeutasTitle: Find work at the best spa
comoFuncionaPage.forTerapeutasSubtitle: Four steps to land a job at the top hotels and spas in the Riviera Maya.
comoFuncionaPage.step1TDesc: Sign up with your email or Google. No credit card or payment required.
comoFuncionaPage.step2TDesc: Upload your photo, select your specialties, choose the zones where you can work, and upload your Litsea certificates to verify your training.
comoFuncionaPage.step3TDesc: Browse active vacancies at luxury hotels and spas. Apply with a single click to those that interest you.
comoFuncionaPage.step4TDesc: The Litsea team reviews your application. If your profile is a good fit, they enable the chat with the employer so you can coordinate the interview directly.
comoFuncionaPage.forEmpleadoresSubtitle: Access certified and verified therapists, ready to work at your spa or hotel.
comoFuncionaPage.step1EDesc: Register as a hotel or spa. Alternatively, the Litsea team can create your account directly from the admin panel.
comoFuncionaPage.step2EDesc: Describe the role, location, contract type, and required specialties. Posting is free and takes less than 5 minutes.
comoFuncionaPage.step3EDesc: Verified therapists apply to your vacancy. You can view their profiles, specialties, and certifications before making a decision.
comoFuncionaPage.step4EDesc: When Litsea approves a candidate, it enables the chat between both parties. Coordinate the interview directly and finalize the hire.
comoFuncionaPage.faqSubtitle: If you have other questions, reach us on WhatsApp.
comoFuncionaPage.a1: Yes, 100% free. Therapists can register, create their profile, and apply to all vacancies at no cost. The platform is a service of Litsea Centro de Capacitación for its graduates.
comoFuncionaPage.q2: Do I need to be a Litsea graduate to register?
comoFuncionaPage.a2: It's not mandatory, but highly recommended. Therapists with Litsea certifications appear as verified in the directory and have greater visibility with employers. Any therapist can register, but profile verification is subject to review by the Litsea team.
comoFuncionaPage.q3: How is the chat with an employer enabled?
comoFuncionaPage.a3: The chat is not activated automatically. The Litsea team reviews each application and, when the candidate is deemed suitable for the vacancy, enables the communication channel. This ensures only contacts with real potential are made on the platform.
comoFuncionaPage.q4: How long does the process take?
comoFuncionaPage.a4: From when you apply to when Litsea enables the chat, the process takes between 24 and 72 business hours. You will receive an email notification when the status of your application changes.
comoFuncionaPage.q5: Can I apply to multiple vacancies at the same time?
comoFuncionaPage.a5: Yes. You can apply to as many vacancies as you like. We recommend completing your profile to 100% before applying: a profile with a photo, specialties, and at least one uploaded certificate has a much higher approval rate.
comoFuncionaPage.q6: Can employers see my contact information directly?
comoFuncionaPage.a6: No. Litsea protects your privacy. Employers only see your professional profile — name, specialties, bio, and certifications — until Litsea enables the chat. Your email, phone, and personal data are never shared without your consent.
comoFuncionaPage.ctaSubtitle: Join the official job platform of Litsea Centro de Capacitación.
